title: CELLULAR IMMUNITY PARAMETERS IN PATIENTS WITH CORONARY ARTERY DISEASE UNDERGOING CORONARY ARTERY BYPASS GRAFTING
author: Mukhammedov Akobir Bakhtiyorovich
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Purpose of the study.    To determine the prognostic value of cellular immunity parameters in patients with coronary artery disease undergoing coronary artery bypass grafting under cardiopulmonary bypass.
steps_raw: Purpose of the study.    To determine the prognostic value of cellular immunity parameters in patients with coronary artery disease undergoing coronary artery bypass grafting under cardiopulmonary bypass.
